title: Bind final release freeze after archive before merge (latest-base rerun)
outOfScope: release tag creation and provider publication

sources.reason: Release publication preflight and lifecycle validation.
Summary validator must accept persisted structured Preflight decisions.
Regression coverage for candidate/final freeze timing.
Regression coverage for structured decision evidence in Summary.
Functional Work Item archive-growth budget and repayment record.
PR ownership gate for archive-bound generated release metadata.
Regression coverage for archive-bound metadata ownership.

riskAssessment.reason: Changes the release-freeze timing contract and generated release evidence; publication remains out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root-cause process correction before publication.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the finalization command is only usable after archive creation and before PR merge; publication remains blocked until post-merge closure evidence is verified.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Finalization before archive or with active Work Items is rejected.
Archived Work Item finalization on a dedicated branch produces source-bound evidence that survives PR merge.

acceptance: A canonical pre-merge finalization mode generates release freeze evidence after Work Item archive creation, so the PR tree already contains the final archive-bound digest.
Release preflight accepts the final freeze only when the merged default tree matches the source-bound freeze and there are no active Work Items; direct protected-main mutation is not required.
Regression tests fail closed for finalization before archive, active Work Items, wrong branch, dirty tree, stale source tree, and archive mismatch.
The archive-growth budget increases from 511 to 512 on the latest default base as evidence for this functional process correction, with repayment recorded; no budget-only Work Item is created.
guidelines: Use canonical finalizer/preflight commands; do not hand-edit generated release evidence.
Keep release-process changes scoped to the template repository and distinguish template from adopter runtime.
Do not publish tags or provider assets from this Work Item.

intent.problem: The completed release-freeze Work Item exposed a structural timing flaw: candidate evidence is generated before archive mutation, while final evidence can only be generated on synchronized default main, which would require a protected-main direct commit after PR merge.
constraints: Finalization must happen after archive creation and before PR merge on the dedicated Work Item branch.
The merged default tree must be content-identical to the finalized PR tree; no post-merge metadata commit is allowed.
Publication and provider assets remain out of scope until the complete lifecycle and final preflight pass.
intent.rationale: Move the final freeze mutation into the governed PR tree and make post-merge preflight a verification step, eliminating the direct protected-main write and its repeated PR failure.

rawUserRequest: Complete the Conditional GO plan and release using Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/ai-close-work-item for every Work Item. If a CI or PR gate reveals a process defect, stop publication and fix the root process first. Do not create a separate budget-only Work Item.

declaredIntent.summary: Move final release freeze generation into the archived Work Item PR tree and enforce post-merge verification without a protected-main write.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized root-cause governance and release-process corrections before publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

repaymentRecords.reason: Functional archive-bound release-freeze rerun on the latest default base; no budget-only Work Item, repay during conditional_go_plan_cleanup after preserving evidence.
Measured latest-base rerun governance growth; no budget-only Work Item, repay during conditional_go_plan_cleanup after preserving evidence.

budgetImpact.reason: The archive is immutable evidence of this functional process correction, not a separate budget reservation.
